tracks.meaning: to focus one's attention or effort intensely on a particular thing
a substance made by dissolving or reducing a liquid to increase the proportion of a dissolved solid
a liquid or syrup made by boiling down fruit juice, typically used as a topping or ingredient
a concentrated form of a product that requires dilution before use
mental focus or the ability to direct one's thoughts toward a single object or task
an area where something (such as population or resources) is gathered densely in one place
to gather or assemble troops or forces in one location for strategic purposes
to think hard about something or engage in deep thought
